x-enumeration-literals.name: Corporate Action Agent
x-enumeration-literals.description: A firm authorised to act as an intermediary between issuer and shareholders. It takes care of the needs of the shareholders such as reporting, inquiries and regulatory compliance. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Corporate Action Offeror
x-enumeration-literals.description: Provides the entity making the offer and that is different from the issuing company. (ISO20022)
